profile.name: Victoria Deogratius Kasapila
profile.title: Data Science Student & Creative Developer
profile.bio: Hello, I'm Victoria Kasapila — a passionate Data Science student focused on intelligent systems, data analytics, machine learning, backend development and modern web technologies. I enjoy building innovative digital systems that solve real-world problems through creativity and technology.
profile.about:
I am a motivated and creative Data Science student passionate about data analysis, artificial intelligence, machine learning, backend systems and frontend development. I enjoy exploring technology that transforms raw data into meaningful insights and interactive digital experiences.

My interests include data visualization, web applications, automation systems, APIs, databases and modern UI/UX design. I continuously learn new technologies and build projects that improve efficiency, creativity and innovation.

skillGroups.title: Data Science
skillGroups.description: Data Cleaning, EDA, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, Pandas, NumPy and Statistical Analysis.

skillGroups.title: Frontend Development
skillGroups.description: Building responsive websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React and modern UI design principles.

skillGroups.title: Backend Development
skillGroups.description: Creating APIs and systems using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB and cloud deployment platforms.

skillGroups.title: Tools & Technologies
skillGroups.description: GitHub, VS Code, MongoDB Atlas, Render, Vercel, Python and Data Visualization Libraries.

projects.title: Automated Data Cleaner & EDA System
projects.description: A smart web application that automatically cleans datasets, removes duplicates, handles missing values and performs exploratory data analysis.

projects.title: Dynamic Portfolio & Analytics System
projects.description: A full-stack portfolio system with frontend, backend APIs, analytics tracking and downloadable portfolio integration.

projects.title: Student Data Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive dashboard for student data visualization, filtering, analytics and reporting using modern charts.

projects.title: Machine Learning Prediction System
projects.description: Predictive system using machine learning algorithms to analyze datasets and generate intelligent predictions.
